metadata.title: Brief an Suzanne Czech vom 16. Mai 1940, SZ-AAP/B3.16

context:
## Dieses Dokument

- Titel: Brief an Suzanne Czech vom 16. Mai 1940, SZ-AAP/B3.16
- Signatur: SZ-AAP/B3.16
- Sprache: Englisch
- Objekttyp: Brief
- Umfang: 3 Scans

pages.transcription:
16th May 1940.

International Copyright Bureau,
Dewar House, Haymarket,
London S.W.1.

Dear Mrs. Czech,

                I thank you for your letter of
May 15th and your proposition with regard to
the placing of the play "Legende eines Lebens"
in the United States. I gratefully accept your
willingness to reduce your commission in this
particular deal to 7 1/2 percent, and I also agree
with the draft of your proposed letter to Dr.
Horch which you will please send off as soon
as possible. I repeat his address: Dr. Franz
Horch, 143 West 73rd Street, New York City .

                I also acknowledge receipt of
your cheque for £ 13.3.10 as refund on your
commission for the amount mistakenly sent you
by M. Alfred Bloch.

                                Sincerely yours,


Stefan Zweig
pages.notes: Typoskript auf Briefpapier. Oben rechts handschriftliche Seitenzahl '38' in roter Tinte.
Farbskala/Grauskala fuer Archivierung, über das Dokument gelegt.

result.confidence_notes: Der Text ist ein klares Typoskript und vollständig lesbar.
